description: cinatra-ai org-wide Renovate defaults. Repos extend this as local>cinatra-ai/.github:renovate-config.

packageRules.description: cinatra-ai/ci reusable-workflow callers are double-pinned (uses:@<sha> plus a with.ref input set to the same SHA). Renovate only rewrites the uses: half, so an automated update would silently diverge the two pins. Internal ci pins are bumped by coordinated org rollout waves instead.

cinatra-ai/.github reusable-workflow callers that pin an UNTAGGED main snapshot carry a synthetic `-main.<shortsha>` version comment (no matching git tag exists). Renovate's github-tags datasource cannot resolve that pseudo-version, so it reports fleet-wide 'Could not determine new digest' package-lookup failures. Suppress updates for the snapshot pins only; a pin that names a real published tag is unaffected and stays Renovate-maintained. When a real tag ships at or above the snapshot, repin the caller (SHA + real-tag comment) and this rule stops matching.
